# Critique of Pure Reason

*[Kant](../philosophers/kant.md) · 1781*

The first of the three Critiques, this landmark work founds transcendental idealism by showing that the mind structures experience through a priori forms, thereby limiting knowledge to phenomena. It curbs the pretensions of metaphysics while safeguarding science.
